Who We Are

Play Safe. Play Happy.
Play Kusi Events.

At Kusi Events Soft Play Rentals, every little one deserves a magical, worry-free experience. Our premium equipment is rigorously sanitised, safety-tested, and certified — making us the trusted choice for birthday parties, toddler groups, and family events.

  • 🛡️ All equipment meets safety standards and is tested before every hire.
  • 🧼 Professional deep-clean with child-safe, antibacterial products after each rental.
  • 🎂 Perfect for birthdays, toddler play dates, nursery events, and more.
  • 🚚 Hassle-free delivery, professional setup, and timely collection.
